sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: From the very first phone call, their customer service was impeccable-- friendly, responsive, and informative.
If there were than 5 stars I could Joseph- I would!SO thorough, SO patient, SO nice, MUCH integrity
Johnny and team were the ONLY inspectors that found root causes to water intrusion and possible mold locations.
He was delightful fun respectful smart clean explained everything couldn't have been better in any way

sentiment.summary: Mold Inspection Sciences has an exceptional reputation with overwhelmingly positive reviews praising their inspectors' professionalism, thoroughness, expertise, and outstanding customer service across all interactions.
